title: Weak Password Policy Leads to Account Takeover
description: The system relies on username/password authentication, and if a weak password policy is in place (e.g., short passwords, lack of complexity requirements), attackers can easily guess or crack user credentials through brute-force or dictionary attacks. This allows unauthorized access to user accounts.
attack_vector: Brute-force attack, credential stuffing, password cracking, phishing campaigns targeting users with weak passwords.
mitigations: Implement a strong password policy (minimum length, complexity requirements, regular password changes).
Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users.
Implement account lockout policies after multiple failed login attempts.
